parameters.query: SELECT name, data FROM key_value_store WHERE name IN ('OPENROUTER_AUTOMATION_API_KEY', 'PERSONAL_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID')
INSERT INTO nitter_app.llm_models (model_name) VALUES ($1) ON CONFLICT (model_name) DO UPDATE SET model_name = EXCLUDED.model_name RETURNING id
SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM nitter_app.tweets t LEFT JOIN nitter_app.tweet_categorizations c ON t.id = c.tweet_id AND c.model_id = $1 WHERE c.id IS NULL

parameters.text:
=⚠️ **Workflow Stopped: Too Many Pending Tweets**

There are {{ $json.count }} uncategorized tweets. Safety limit is 10,000.
To process anyway, set `bypass_10k_limit` to true in 'Configuration'.

parameters.query: SELECT t.id as tweet_id, t.content_html, t.nitter_guid FROM nitter_app.tweets t LEFT JOIN nitter_app.tweet_categorizations c ON t.id = c.tweet_id AND c.model_id = $1 WHERE c.id IS NULL ORDER BY t.published_at DESC LIMIT $2
INSERT INTO nitter_app.tweet_categorizations (tweet_id, model_id, language_result, categories) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4) ON CONFLICT (tweet_id, model_id) DO NOTHING
